summary: Verstappen hunts redemption at Spa after consecutive high-speed crashes force Red Bull into a defensive wing setup change, while Mercedes' Antonelli signals genuine threat with Friday's fastest time. Norris arrives neutered by a 10-place grid penalty from engine penalties, handing rivals a golden opportunity to reshape the championship landscape at a track where overtaking remains notoriously difficult. A victory here could prove decisive in the title fight—Verstappen needs to reassert dominance after two races of mechanical misfortune, while McLaren and Mercedes circle to capitalize on Red Bull's vulnerability.
